svg.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Prototype: dashboard scaled to 50 queues with attention list + grouped compact tail
svg.desc: Dashboard view scaled to 50 queues. Three queues that need attention are promoted to full-fidelity 120px rows with mini-pipelines. The remaining 47 queues are grouped by namespace and rendered as 32px compact rows with a one-line spark-pipeline that still expresses state via colour and motion frequency. Two namespaces are expanded, two are collapsed.

g.text: 3 queues need a look • auto-promoted from the namespace tail below
ALL QUEUES • 47 OF 50 • GROUPED BY NAMESPACE
click row to expand • click ns to collapse
+ 6 more chat queues • click ns header to expand

PROTOTYPE • attention list auto-promotes queues with state != healthy • compact rows use spark-pipeline at 32px height • namespace groups collapse non-interesting tail • ~80 active animations on this view, all client-driven from one snapshot poll
